subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 5: Speaking
description: Thảo luận về mục tiêu nghề nghiệp

theory.title: Speaking: Discussing Career Goals and Plans

sections.heading: 1. Useful Expressions for Talking About Careers
sections.content:
Expressing Career Aspirations:

  • I look forward to working in...
  • I hope to pursue a career in...
  • My goal is to become...
  • I'm interested in...
  • I'd like to specialize in...
  • I aspire to be...

Talking About Skills:

  • I'm good at...
  • I have experience in...
  • I've developed skills in...
  • I need to improve my...
  • I'm working on...
  • I'm trying to catch up with...

Discussing Challenges:

  • I have to put up with...
  • I need to face up to...
  • The main challenge is...
  • I'm struggling with...
  • I find it difficult to...
  • I need to keep up with...

Talking About Plans:

  • I plan to...
  • I'm going to...
  • I intend to...
  • I've come up with a plan to...
  • My next step is to...
  • I aim to...

sections.heading: 2. Sample Dialogues
sections.content:
Dialogue 1: Discussing Career Goals

A: What career are you looking forward to?

B: I look forward to working in software development. I've always been interested in technology.

A: That's great! What skills do you need to develop?

B: I need to keep up with the latest programming languages and catch up with industry trends. I'm also working on my problem-solving skills.

Dialogue 2: Talking About Challenges

A: How's your job search going?

B: It's challenging. I have to put up with many rejections, but I'm not giving up.

A: That's the right attitude. Have you come up with any new strategies?

B: Yes, I'm networking more and trying to get on with professionals in my field.

Dialogue 3: Career Planning

A: What are your long-term career goals?

B: I want to live up to my potential and become a team leader within five years.

A: How do you plan to achieve that?

B: I need to face up to my weaknesses and work on my leadership skills. I also look up to successful managers and learn from them.

sections.heading: 3. Discussion Topics
sections.content:
Topics for Practice:

  1. Your Dream Career: Describe your ideal job and explain why you're interested in it.
  2. Skills Development: Talk about the skills you need to develop for your chosen career.
  3. Career Challenges: Discuss the challenges you might face and how you plan to overcome them.
  4. Work-Life Balance: Explain how you plan to maintain balance between work and personal life.
  5. Role Models: Talk about professionals you look up to and what you can learn from them.
  6. Career Changes: Discuss whether you think people should stick to one career or be open to changes.

sections.heading: 4. Pronunciation Tips
sections.content:
Stress in Three-word Phrasal Verbs:

  • LOOK forward TO
  • COME up WITH
  • GET on WITH
  • CATCH up WITH
  • KEEP up WITH
  • PUT up WITH
  • RUN out OF
  • LOOK up TO
  • FACE up TO
  • LIVE up TO
  • MAKE up FOR

Remember: Stress the first verb and the final preposition, not the middle particle.

exercises.question: Which expression is used to talk about career aspirations?
options: I look forward to working in...
exercises.explanation: 'I look forward to working in...' diễn tả nguyện vọng nghề nghiệp.

exercises.question: How do you express that you admire someone professionally?
exercises.explanation: 'I look up to them' nghĩa là tôi ngưỡng mộ họ.

exercises.question: Which phrase means you need to stay current with changes?
exercises.explanation: 'Keep up with' nghĩa là theo kịp, cập nhật.

exercises.question: How do you say you tolerate difficult situations?
exercises.explanation: 'Put up with' nghĩa là chịu đựng.

exercises.question: Which expression means to create an idea or plan?
exercises.explanation: 'Come up with' nghĩa là nghĩ ra, đưa ra ý tưởng.

exercises.question: How do you say you have good relationships with colleagues?
exercises.explanation: 'Get on with' nghĩa là hòa hợp với.

exercises.question: Which phrase means to confront a problem?
exercises.explanation: 'Face up to' nghĩa là đối mặt với.

exercises.question: How do you express meeting expectations?
exercises.explanation: 'Live up to' nghĩa là đáp ứng (kỳ vọng).

exercises.question: Which expression means to compensate for something?
exercises.explanation: 'Make up for' nghĩa là bù đắp.

exercises.question: In Dialogue 1, what does B need to do?
exercises.explanation: B cần 'keep up with the latest programming languages' - theo kịp ngôn ngữ lập trình mới.

exercises.question_text: Mark True or False about career expressions:
options: 'Come up with' means to create ideas.
'Get on with' means to have conflicts.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Mong chờ. b) False - Nghĩa là chịu đựng. c) True - Nghĩ ra ý tưởng. d) False - Nghĩa là hòa hợp.

options: 'Keep up with' means to stay current.
'Run out of' means to have plenty.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Ngưỡng mộ. b) False - Nghĩa là đối mặt. c) True - Theo kịp. d) False - Nghĩa là cạn kiệt.

exercises.question_text: Based on the dialogues, mark True or False:
options: B in Dialogue 1 is interested in technology.
B in Dialogue 2 gives up after rejections.
B in Dialogue 3 wants to become a team leader.
Networking is not mentioned in the dialogues.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Quan tâm công nghệ. b) False - Không bỏ cuộc. c) True - Muốn trở thành trưởng nhóm. d) False - Có đề cập networking.

exercises.question_text: Complete: I _____ _____ to working with you. (three words)
exercises.explanation: 'Look forward to' - mong chờ.

exercises.question_text: Complete: I need to _____ _____ _____ the latest trends. (four words)
exercises.explanation: 'Keep up with' - theo kịp.

exercises.question_text: What phrasal verb means 'to admire'? (three words)
exercises.explanation: 'Look up to' - ngưỡng mộ.

exercises.question: Which topic is NOT mentioned in the discussion topics?
exercises.explanation: Retirement Planning không được đề cập trong các chủ đề thảo luận.

exercises.question: Where should you stress in 'look forward to'?
exercises.explanation: Nhấn vào 'LOOK' và 'TO', không nhấn 'forward'.

exercises.question: According to Dialogue 3, what does B need to do?
exercises.explanation: B cần 'face up to weaknesses' - đối mặt với điểm yếu.

exercises.question: Which expression is used to talk about creating strategies?
exercises.explanation: 'Come up with strategies' - nghĩ ra chiến lược.
